title: Behavior API Exception Registry
description: Documents all approved exceptions to the Behavior API enforcement rules.

exceptions.reason: Continuous infinite scroll animation has no Behavior API primitive
exceptions.evidence: useAmbient, useReveal, useFocus, useTransition, useInteraction, useStagger none support continuous infinite translation
exceptions.notes: Re-evaluate when scroll/translate primitive is added to Behavior API

exceptions.reason: Deterministic progress bar fill is better suited to CSS animation
exceptions.evidence: Behavior API useAmbient handles pulse overlay, but progress fill requires deterministic width interpolation
exceptions.notes: Consider useTransition for progress bar if state-based control is needed

exceptions.reason: Deterministic progress bar fill is better suited to CSS animation
exceptions.evidence: Behavior API useAmbient handles pulse overlay, but progress fill requires deterministic width interpolation
exceptions.notes: Consider useTransition for progress bar if state-based control is needed

exceptions.reason: Simple hover/press state transitions are optimal in CSS
exceptions.evidence: CSS transitions are hardware-accelerated, require no JavaScript overhead, and are simpler for state-based transitions
exceptions.notes: Complex hover animations should use useInteraction

exceptions.reason: Existing dependency used in 16 components across the platform
exceptions.evidence: framer-motion is in package.json and actively used in navbar, project cards, contact form, about section, services, film strip, section narrator, and other components
exceptions.scope: All framer-motion imports across the platform
exceptions.notes: Migration to Behavior API planned for future sprints. This is a temporary exception for existing usage. New components MUST use Behavior API only.

exceptions.reason: Existing dependency used in FilmStripSection for advanced timeline animations
exceptions.evidence: gsap is in package.json and used in FilmStripSection.tsx for complex timeline animations
exceptions.notes: Consider migrating to Behavior API useAmbient or useReveal if simpler animation can replace GSAP timeline

exceptions.reason: Loading bar uses inline CSS animation for deterministic progress fill
exceptions.evidence: The loadingBarFill keyframe provides deterministic width interpolation which is optimal in CSS
exceptions.scope: Inline animation style on loadingBarFill only
exceptions.notes: Behavior API useAmbient handles the pulse overlay on the same component

exceptions.reason: Loading bar uses inline CSS animation for deterministic progress fill
exceptions.evidence: The loadingBarFill keyframe provides deterministic width interpolation which is optimal in CSS
exceptions.scope: Inline animation style on loadingBarFill only
exceptions.notes: Behavior API useAmbient handles the pulse overlay on the same component
